success_factors: Workflow completed end-to-end with status=success across all planned nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize).
Repository ingestion succeeded via zip fallback and AST-based discovery identified core Prophet modules/functions.
MCP plugin generation produced a complete runnable artifact set (entrypoint, adapter, service, README, requirements).
Generated MCP service passed health/startup checks (healthy, stdio transport), indicating functional baseline operability.
failure_reasons: Quality gaps reduced confidence: original project tests not executed/passed, DeepWiki analysis failed, and endpoint exposure appears over-broad (including setup/build internals and classes).
Dependency detection failed for subdirectory layout (python/pyproject.toml and python/setup.py were present but reported absent).

node_performance.download_time: Completed successfully; repository imported via zip fallback. Timing breakdown per node not provided, so only qualitative assessment is possible.
node_performance.analysis_time: Successful static analysis/AST scan of 66 files; detected key packages and callable surfaces, but metadata extraction for dependency manifests was inaccurate.
node_performance.generation_time: Generation succeeded and emitted required MCP files; however generated metrics (LOC/size/endpoints=0 in one section) are inconsistent with service endpoint list, indicating instrumentation/reporting drift.
node_performance.test_time: MCP plugin runtime health checks passed; original project test execution absent/effectively failed, leaving behavioral parity unverified.

resource_usage.memory_efficiency: Unknown due to missing telemetry (reported 0 MB likely means not collected).
resource_usage.cpu_efficiency: Unknown due to missing telemetry (reported 0% likely means not collected).
resource_usage.disk_usage: Low-to-moderate; generated artifact footprint appears small, but exact size metrics are missing/inconsistent.
